Securing the Digital Frontier.

HKCO CTF SOLUTIONS is the premier architect for high-fidelity cyber ranges, gamified vulnerability research, and national-level Capture The Flag competitions.

Deploy Cyber Range

Our Core Capabilities

Custom CTF Platforms

End-to-end hosting for Jeopardy and Attack/Defense style events. Scalable cloud infrastructure that stays up even during the heaviest exploitation attempts.

Vulnerability Synthesis

Our lab creates bespoke "Hard" level challenges including esoteric binary exploitation, kernel-level drivers, and complex web polyglots.

Red Team Training

Gamified offensive security simulations designed for secondary schools, universities, and corporate security departments globally.

We Are Hiring Hackers

HKCO CTF SOLUTIONS is looking for creative minds to break things for a living. If you have experience in Web exploitation, we want to hear from you.
